{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Simon's Territory
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] has a [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] produced a giant silver hammer from his [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
